title: Ignite
description: A Warfare Mod based around War without the Illegal Ways!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e210a476591c9c4136dff7d79c06397abfca872_0.webp)
## **DO NOT PLAY THIS MOD IF YOU ARE SENSITIVE TO WARFARE MATERIAL!!**
### Adds 18 types of weapons ![guns](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5db54713ed322a2f14d837d83c92feca6174b70.png) ### Adds 9+ types of explosives ![bomb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/005be483fb5f24e7c03645d7418c0d5c76c7f6d0.png) ### Adds many diffrent rounds for all of your new weapons ![ammo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cba73597566e52826c7526a4d3822cb886479d6e.png) ![threat/j](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e25cdda22325ce39acdcbec5594772bb1b7f441.png) Again still so much more needing to be made, and bugs to be fixed!
